headline: How The Intuit (INTU) Investment Story Is Shifting With AI Risks And Lower Targets
summary: Intuit’s updated analyst narrative centers on a lower fair value estimate, shifting from US$761.29 to US$605.52, which now sits closer to the US$500 to US$600 range many Street targets cluster around. This reset lines up with recent research that weighs AI risk, tax season dependency, and newer offerings against what analysts still see as valuable core franchises and ongoing product adoption. As you read on, you will see how these moving pieces shape the evolving story around Intuit and what...

headline: Redburn upgrades Intuit saying core software resilient to AI disruption
